mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student
AND (student_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{studentNumber}, '%') OR student_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{studentNumber}, '%'))
AND grade = #{grade}
AND class_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{className}, '%')
SELECT DISTINCT class_name FROM student WHERE class_name IS NOT NULL AND class_name != '' ORDER BY class_name ASC
SELECT grade, COUNT(*) as count FROM student GROUP BY grade ORDER BY grade DESC
SELECT student_id, student_number, student_name, grade, major, class_name, college FROM student WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student ( student_number, student_name, grade, major, class_name, college ) VALUES ( #{studentNumber}, #{studentName}, #{grade}, #{major}, #{className}, #{college} )
mapper.update: UPDATE student SET student_number = #{studentNumber}, student_name = #{studentName}, grade = #{grade}, major = #{major}, class_name = #{className}, college = #{college} WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
mapper.select:
SELECT student_id, student_number, student_name, grade, major, class_name, college FROM student
AND (student_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{studentNumber}, '%') OR student_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{studentNumber}, '%'))
AND grade = #{grade}
AND class_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{className}, '%')
ORDER BY grade ASC, student_id ASC
